generated_oml:
// C2: Acting Components
instance MotorActuationSystem : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Electronic speed controller interfacing with the ego vehicle's motor for real-time speed regulation via ROS2 commands from the Digital Twin Entity"
]

instance SteeringServoActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Lower-level chassis servo system for directional control, receiving commands from the Digital Twin Entity via ROS2 middleware"
]

instance EmergencyBrakingActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Remote emergency braking system integrated with the motor actuation system, enabled via Digital Twin control panel commands"
]

// C3: Physical Sensing Components
instance HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "3D environmental perception sensor generating raw point clouds for object detection and spatial mapping"
    DTDFVocab:producedData HokuyoPointCloudData
]

instance IntelDeepsenseD435iCamera : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Depth camera providing supplementary visual data for environmental perception alongside LiDAR data"
    DTDFVocab:producedData DepthCameraData
]

instance VehicleStateSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Implicit chassis-integrated sensors providing real-time ego vehicle speed and steering angle data"
    DTDFVocab:producedData VehicleStateData
]

// C4: Physical-to-Virtual Data Transmission
instance HokuyoPointCloudData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR
]

instance DepthCameraData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IntelDeepsenseD435iCamera
]

instance VehicleStateData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VehicleStateSensor
]

instance ObjectTrackData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom PointCloudProcessingEnabler
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance PointCloudClusteringModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "DBSCAN-based clustering algorithm for LiDAR point cloud segmentation, combined with Kalman filtering for object state estimation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PointCloudProcessingEnabler
]

instance AccControlModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "ISO 15622-compliant Adaptive Cruise Control logic for lead vehicle detection and speed regulation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ControllingEnabler
]

instance RawSensorData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Unprocessed time-series data including LiDAR point clouds, depth camera frames, and raw vehicle state metrics"
    DTDFVocab:fromData HokuyoPointCloudData, DepthCameraData, VehicleStateData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataPreProcessingEnabler
]

instance ProcessedObjectTracks : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Filtered and tracked object representations generated from raw sensor data via DBSCAN+Kalman processing"
    DTDFVocab:fromData ObjectTrackData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PresentationEnabler, ReportingEnabler
]

instance EgoVehicleStateData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Processed time-series data containing speed and steering angle metrics for the ego vehicle"
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleStateData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PresentationEnabler, ReportingEnabler
]

instance TimeSeriesReports : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Human-readable SQL-stored reports containing historical time-series data for object tracks and vehicle state"
    DTDFVocab:fromData ProcessedObjectTracks, EgoVehicleStateData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ReportingEnabler
]

// C11: Enablers
instance DataPreProcessingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS2-based node for LiDAR data normalization and initial sensor data validation"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance DataCollectingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS2 topic aggregation system collecting all sensor data streams for processing"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance PointCloudProcessingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink-based implementation of DBSCAN clustering and Kalman filtering for object tracking"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ObjectTrackData
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance ControllingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ISO 23247-mapped functional entity executing ACC logic for lead vehicle detection and speed regulation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AccControlModel
    DTDFVocab:enables RemoteManagementService, ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance ActuationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS2 node converting control commands to motor/steering actuation signals for the physical twin"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MotorActuationSystem, SteeringServoActuator, EmergencyBrakingActuator
    DTDFVocab:enables RemoteManagementService, ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance PresentationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Custom 3D visualization UI rendering real-time object tracks, vehicle state, and projected driving path"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ProcessedObjectTracks, EgoVehicleStateData
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance ReportingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SQL database-backed reporting frontend generating human-readable time-series reports"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimeSeriesReports
    DTDFVocab:enables ReportGenerationService
]

instance DataTranslationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS2-to-WiFi serialization component enabling inter-entity communication between Physical and Digital Twins"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance SqlDataStorage : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SQL database system storing processed time-series reports and historical data"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimeSeriesReports
    DTDFVocab:enables ReportGenerationService
]

// C6: Services
instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of ego vehicle state (speed, steering angle), object tracks, and projected driving path via 3D Visualization UI"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeVisualizationInsight, ObjectTrackingInsight
]

instance ComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Execution of ACC logic (lead vehicle detection, speed calculation) in the Digital Twin to reduce Physical Twin's computational load"
    DTDFVocab:provides LeadVehicleDetectionAction, SpeedRegulationAction
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Full ACC control (enable/disable, desired speed adjustment, emergency braking) via Control Panel UI enabling off-site operation"
    DTDFVocab:provides RemoteControlAction, EmergencyBrakingAction
]

instance ReportGenerationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Automated generation of human-readable reports containing time-series data for object tracks and vehicle state"
    DTDFVocab:provides ReportGenerationInsight
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance RealTimeVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Transparent display of current vehicle state and environmental context enabling driver trust in ACC system decisions"
]

instance ObjectTrackingInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Visual representation of detected objects and their trajectories for situational awareness"
]

instance LeadVehicleDetectionAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic identification of lead vehicles in the driving path using ISO 15622-compliant algorithms"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance SpeedRegulationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Dynamic speed adjustment to maintain safe following distance from detected lead vehicles"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance RemoteControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Off-site enablement/disablement of ACC system and adjustment of desired speed parameters"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance EmergencyBrakingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Immediate deceleration command execution in response to critical situations detected by the Digital Twin"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ReportGenerationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "SQL-stored historical records of vehicle state and object tracking data for post-operation analysis"
]

// C12: Physical Twin Entity
instance PhysicalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Onboard compute platform hosting Jetson Orin Nano with ROS2 middleware and sensor hardware"
    base:contains HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR, IntelDeepsenseD435iCamera, VehicleStateSensor,
                 MotorActuationSystem, SteeringServoActuator, EmergencyBrakingActuator,
                 DataCollectingEnabler, PointCloudProcessingEnabler, ActuationEnabler,
                 DataTranslationEnabler
]

// C13: Digital Twin Entity
instance DigitalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Cloud/edge compute platform hosting ACC logic, data processing, and storage components"
    base:contains DataPreProcessingEnabler, ControllingEnabler, PresentationEnabler,
                 ReportingEnabler, SqlDataStorage
]

// C14: User Entity
instance UserEntity : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Remote control interface enabling developers to monitor and manage ACC system operations"
    base:contains PresentationEnabler, RemoteManagementService
]

// C15: Communication Protocols
instance Ros2Communication : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "ROS2 middleware enabling intra-vehicle communication and inter-entity coordination"
]

instance WiFiCommunication : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Wi-Fi protocol facilitating data transmission between Physical Twin and Digital Twin entities"
]

// C16: Compute Platforms
instance JetsonOrinNano : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano microcomputer running Jetpack 5.0 SDK for onboard processing"
]

instance CloudEdgeServer : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Cloud/edge server hosting Digital Twin computation and storage resources"
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The virtual-to-physical interaction includes:
  - **Computed desired speed** from the **ACC Controlling Functional Entity (FE)** in the **Digital Twin Entity**, transmitted to the PT via **Wi-Fi** and **ROS2**.
  - **Actuation commands** (e.g., motor voltage, steering adjustments) sent from the DT to the PT’s **Vedder Speed Controller** and **steering servo** for real-time control.
  - **Emergency braking commands** initiated remotely via the **User Entity** and executed by the PT’s actuation system.
  Latency is constrained to **≤100 ms** (3GPP TS 22.185 compliance) for real-time safety-critical operations."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The twinning time scale is governed by **real-time synchronization and latency constraints**:
  - **Clock synchronization**: All components (PT, DT, User Entity) are synchronized to an **accuracy of ±100 ms** to ensure temporal coherence for distributed control.
  - **End-to-end latency**: Communication between PT and DT must adhere to a **≤100 ms latency** (as per **3GPP TS 22.185** for V2V communication).
  - **Data update rates**:
    - **Sensor data streams** (LiDAR, camera) are processed at **real-time frequencies** (exact Hz not specified but implied by 'streams updated every perception cycle').
    - **ACC control loop** operates at a rate sufficient for **performance class I ACC** (no explicit Hz mentioned but inferred to be **~10–30 Hz** for real-time control)."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The DT constellation is organized as a **three-tiered, entity-based architecture** aligned with ISO 23247, with modifications for automotive use:
  - **Physical Twin Entity**: Hosts **sensors (LiDAR, camera)**, **actuators (motor, steering)**, and **pre-processing FEs** (DBSCAN, Kalman filter). Deployed on **Jetson Orin Nano**.
  - **Digital Twin Entity**: Executes **ACC logic (Controlling FE)**, **data processing (Data Collecting FE)**, and **storage (SQL database)**. Deployed on **cloud/edge server**.
  - **User Entity**: Provides **3D Visualization UI** and **Control Panel UI** for remote monitoring/management. Deployed on **remote workstation**.
  - **Cross-System Entity**: **Data Translation FE** ensures seamless interoperability between ROS2 (intra-vehicle) and Wi-Fi (inter-vehicle) communication. The constellation adheres to **modularity principles** (loose coupling) and **real-time constraints** (≤100 ms latency)."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The DT covers **design, development, and operational phases** of the PT’s lifecycle:
  - **Design Phase**: Used for **cyber-physical experimentation** (e.g., ACC logic validation via simulation).
  - **Development Phase**: Enables **remote troubleshooting** and **data-driven debugging** via real-time monitoring.
  - **Operational Phase**: Supports **real-time ACC control**, **predictive maintenance**, and **remote management** of the PT.
  The DT represents the PT in its **as-operated state**, with **high-fidelity models** of the **ACC system** and **environmental interactions** (e.g., object tracking)."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin achieves **high fidelity** through:
  - **Real-Time Synchronization**: Clock accuracy of **±100 ms** ensures temporal alignment between PT and DT.
  - **Sensor Fusion**: Combines **LiDAR (Hokuyo UST-10LX)** and **depth camera (Intel D435i)** for robust object tracking via **DBSCAN + Kalman filtering**.
  - **ACC Compliance**: Adheres to **ISO 15622** for Performance Class I ACC, ensuring valid speed control logic.
  - **Latency Constraints**: **≤100 ms** end-to-end latency guarantees timely actuation responses.
  - **Validation Mechanisms**:
    - **Real-time monitoring** via UI for operator feedback.
    - **Emergency braking tests** to verify safety-critical responses.
  Uncertainty sources include **sensor noise** (mitigated by DBSCAN) and **network jitter** (constrained by Wi-Fi latency)."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin system employs the following technical connection details:
  - **Network Protocols**:
    - **Wi-Fi**: Used for **inter-entity communication** between PT and DT (no explicit topology mentioned; assumed to be a **point-to-point or star topology** based on typical automotive setups).
    - **ROS2**: Used for **intra-entity communication** within each entity (PT, DT, User).
  - **Data Translation**:
    - **Data Translation FE** handles serialization, unit conversion, and message alignment between entities.
    - Supports **custom communication layers** or **OPC UA (IEC 62541)** for standardized data exchange (as referenced in background).
  - **Security Assumptions**:
    - **No explicit mention of encryption** (Wi-Fi assumed to be unencrypted unless configured externally).
    - **No detailed security protocols** specified beyond the physical-to-virtual interaction."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin system is hosted and deployed as follows:
  - **Physical Twin Entity**: Deployed on the **Jetson Orin Nano** (onboard the 1/10-scale vehicle), running **ROS2** and **Jetpack 5.0**.
  - **Digital Twin Entity**: Deployed on a **remote server/cloud/edge node** (unspecified hardware), capable of offloading compute-intensive tasks (e.g., ACC logic).
  - **User Entity**: Deployed on a **remote workstation**, providing the **3D Visualization UI** and **Control Panel**.
  - **Data Storage**: Hosted on the **Digital Twin Entity’s SQL database** (external to the PT)."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "The DT supports limited horizontal integration:
  - **ROS2 Integration**: Enables interoperability with **third-party automotive tools** (e.g., **Simulink**, **OPC UA** for future standardization).
  - **Data Exchange**: **SQL database** allows integration with **external analytics platforms** for post-hoc analysis.
  - **No Explicit Mention**: The document does not detail integration with **other DTs**, **enterprise systems**, or **cloud platforms** (e.g., AWS, Azure). Potential future work includes **OPC UA** for industrial interoperability."
]

instance data_ownership_and_privacy : DTDFVocab:DataOwnershipPrivacy [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin system addresses data ownership and privacy as follows:
  - **Data Storage**:
    - Ego vehicle state data is stored on a **device external to the vehicle** (remote server/cloud).
    - No explicit mention of **data ownership** (PT owner vs. DT service provider) or **privacy policies** (e.g., GDPR compliance).
  - **Access Control**:
    - No details provided on **user authentication**, **role-based access**, or **data anonymization**.
  - **Geographic Privacy**:
    - No mention of **location-based privacy concerns** or **data encryption** for sensitive vehicle data."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The DT adheres to the following standards:
  - **ISO 23247**: Reference architecture framework for **entity-based DT design** (Observable Manufacturing Element → Digital Twin Entity → User Entity).
  - **ISO 15622**: **ACC system specification** (Performance Class I compliance for speed regulation).
  - **3GPP TS 22.185**: **V2V communication latency requirements** (≤100 ms end-to-end).
  - **IEC 62541 (OPC UA)**: **Potential future integration** for standardized data translation (not implemented in this case study).
  - **ROS2**: **Middleware standard** for automotive software development.
  The architecture deviates from ISO 23247 by introducing a **Physical Twin Entity** (not defined in the standard) to host **automotive-specific resources** (sensors, actuators)."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin system incorporates the following security and safety considerations:
  - **Safety**:
    - **Latency constraint**: ≤100 ms end-to-end delay to prevent control delays in critical scenarios.
    - **Clock synchronization**: ±100 ms accuracy to ensure temporal coherence for distributed control.
    - **Emergency braking**: Remote command capability for critical stoppage.
    - **Human-in-the-Loop**: System classified as **Fully Autonomous Digital Twin with Human-in-the-Loop** (David & Bork taxonomy).
  - **Security**:
    - **No explicit security protocols** mentioned (e.g., Wi-Fi encryption, authentication).
    - **No mention of**:
      - Cybersecurity risks (e.g., man-in-the-middle attacks).
      - Unauthorized remote control vulnerabilities.
      - Data integrity mechanisms (e.g., checksums, digital signatures).
    - **Assumed security**: Reliance on **physical access control** (e.g., remote workstation access) and **Wi-Fi network security** (not detailed)."
]
